name: Parallelism and Supervision
intent: Infer parallelism from ${{ }} dependency graph, execute independent steps concurrently as multiple subprocesses, add timeout supervision.

success_criteria.criterion: Explicit parallel: blocks fan out correctly
Conservative plan adds implicit sequential deps by default

specs.name: Dependency Graph
specs.intent: Build DAG from ${{ }} refs, compute execution layers
acceptance_criteria: Conservative plan adds sequential deps for steps without refs

specs.name: Parallel Execution
acceptance_criteria: Results collected and stored per step
Failure in one parallel step handled correctly

specs.name: Parallel Demo
specs.intent: Working demo of parallel analysis workflow
